$comment: Example LPDF_DIE_OPACITY_LOW finding (D-09). Emitted when a dieline / cutter spot is painted with alpha < 100%. Same RIP failure surface as D-08 — partial transparency does not survive separation, so the cut plate either drops to zero coverage or composites into the substrate. ISO 32000-2:2020 §11.6.4.4 / ISO 19593-1 §5.3.
message: Dieline 'Dieline' painted with alpha < 100% on page 1 (1 paint op(s), min 50%) — RIP will drop or composite the cutter plate
